title: @sentry/cloudflare crashes DurableObjects due to unsafe & unnecessary proxying of `waitUntil()`
body: ### Which SDK are you using? @sentry/cloudflare ### SDK Version 9.40.0 we are seeing sentry's cloudflare SDK frequently cause infinite recursion issues with DurableObjects. production stacktrace: source code referenced: link to repo source: https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-javascript/blame/12528ec04ce752db6e800f2d577c3d7fcda3d24b/packages/cloudflare/src/flush.ts#L22 ## this code is broken and unnecessary **there is no reason (ever) to call `waitUntil()` inside a DurableObject**. it is a no-op; please see the [documentation](https://developers.cloudflare.com/durable-objects/api/state/#waituntil)
